| deity = {{ill|Tenjin (kami)|lt=Tenjin|de|Tenjin|en|Tenjin (kami)|fr|Tenjin|hu|Tendzsin|ja|天満大自在天神|mni|ꯇꯦꯟꯖꯤꯟ (ꯂꯥꯢ)|pl|Tenjin|ru|Тэндзин|simple|Tenjin|sr|Tenđin|te|టెన్జిన్ (కామి)|th|เท็นจิง|zh|天滿大自在天神|qid=Q1753428|1=Tenjin (kami)}}
}}

{{nihongo|'''Amanoihatowakenoyasukunitama- Shrine'''|天石門別安国玉主天神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tosa Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|lt=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>
* {{ill|Q134917286|ltq=Q134917286|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}
* {{ill|Q798838|ltq=Q798838|qid=Q798838|1=Tenmangū}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Tosa Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Tosa Province|ja|土佐国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11423010|1=List of Shikinaisha in Tosa Province}}
** Series ordinal: 18
** P155: {{ill|Q11517328|ltq=Q11517328|qid=Q11517328|1=Asakura Shrine (Kōchi)}}
** P156: {{ill|Itsutano Shrine|lt=Itsutano Shrine|qid=Q135041455|1=Itsutano Shrine}}

* {{ill|Agawa District, Kōchi|lt=Agawa district|ceb|Agawa-gun|en|Agawa District, Kōchi|es|Distrito de Agawa|fr|District d'Agawa|id|Distrik Agawa, Kōchi|it|Distretto di Agawa|ja|吾川郡|ko|아가와군|pl|Powiat Agawa|uk|Повіт Аґава|vi|Agawa (huyện)|zh|吾川郡|qid=Q1132141|1=Agawa District, Kōchi}}

* アマノイハトワケノヤスクニタマ-<ref>Engishiki Jinmyōchō</ref>
